name: io.github.veracium-ai/veracium
description: Provenance-aware memory for AI agents: quarantined third-party claims, abstention-gated answers, supersession with history. One SQLite file.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the reference Anthropic provider

environmentVariables.name: VERACIUM_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite memory file (default: veracium.db)

environmentVariables.name: VERACIUM_USER
environmentVariables.description: Default user id when a tool call omits user_id
